header: We started because shipping software felt harder than it should
lead: In 2019, two engineers were tired of stitching five disconnected tools together just to release one feature.
body: So we built the platform we wished we had: one place to plan, ship, and measure, without the integration tax. Five years later, more than 4,000 teams in 40 countries run their releases on it, from two-person startups to public companies. We are still a small, independent team, and we still answer our own support tickets.
